projects.name: Estoiko Lab Chat Agents
projects.type: AI chat agents and lead capture
projects.problem: A marketing agency needs a way to sell AI chat agents to clients and capture leads from conversations.
projects.solution: Built a Telegram-based AI agent system with company config, agent knowledge base, lead capture, Supabase storage and a Streamlit dashboard.

projects.name: RSTATE Real Estate Campaign System
projects.type: campaign landing page and operations dashboard
projects.problem: A real estate office needed a mini landing page, asset upload flow and campaign readiness process.
projects.solution: Built a configurable landing page, campaign dashboard, media manager and Meta campaign preflight flow.

projects.name: RH1 Recruiting Operations Dashboard
projects.problem: Recruiting operations needed visibility into vacancies, candidates, pipeline and interviews.
projects.solution: Activated a Streamlit dashboard with RH views, pipeline, interviews, AI analysis and supporting skills.

projects.name: EMP_LOGPLAT Fleet Operations System
projects.problem: A freight/logistics operation needed a practical way to capture trips, expenses, payments and accounts receivable without depending on manual spreadsheets.
projects.solution: Built a Factory3-based operations system for Platino Logistica with a dedicated Supabase schema, message handler skills, KPI skills and a Streamlit dashboard for trips, expenses, payments, accounts receivable and analysis.
outcomes: Real production use by a freight company
Dashboard sections for Overview, Viajes, Gastos, Pagos, CXC and Analisis
Message handler skill for operational capture
KPI skill for weekly profit, receivables balance and trip metrics
Strong case study candidate because the system is already used in daily operations
